Package com.wip.dto

Class TrackingUpdateDto

java.lang.Object
com.wip.dto.TrackingUpdateDto
public class TrackingUpdateDto extends Object
Data Transfer Object for transferring tracking update information between the API layer and the service layer.

This DTO represents a single checkpoint event in a shipment's delivery journey. It is used both as a request body (when an administrator records a new tracking milestone) and as a response payload (to display the history of delivery events). The updateId, shipmentId, trackingNumber, and createdAt fields are populated by the server in response payloads. The deliveryStatus and location fields are mandatory for create requests.

Since:
1.0
Version:
1.0
Author:
Rohith Varma K

  • Method Details

    • getUpdateId

      public Long getUpdateId()
      Returns the unique identifier of this tracking update.
      Returns:
      the update ID, or null if not yet persisted

    • setUpdateId

      public void setUpdateId(Long updateId)
      Sets the unique identifier of this tracking update.
      Parameters:
      updateId - the update ID to assign

    • getShipmentId

      public Long getShipmentId()
      Returns the ID of the shipment associated with this tracking update.
      Returns:
      the shipment ID

    • setShipmentId

      public void setShipmentId(Long shipmentId)
      Sets the ID of the shipment associated with this tracking update.
      Parameters:
      shipmentId - the shipment ID to assign

    • getTrackingNumber

      public String getTrackingNumber()
      Returns the tracking number of the associated shipment.
      Returns:
      the tracking number string, or null if not populated

    • setTrackingNumber

      public void setTrackingNumber(String trackingNumber)
      Sets the tracking number of the associated shipment.
      Parameters:
      trackingNumber - the tracking number to assign

    • getDeliveryStatus

      public String getDeliveryStatus()
      Returns the delivery status recorded for this tracking event.
      Returns:
      the delivery status string (e.g., "In Transit")

    • setDeliveryStatus

      public void setDeliveryStatus(String deliveryStatus)
      Sets the delivery status for this tracking event.
      Parameters:
      deliveryStatus - the delivery status to assign; must not be blank

    • getLocation

      public String getLocation()
      Returns the geographic location recorded for this tracking event.
      Returns:
      the location string at the time of this update

    • setLocation

      public void setLocation(String location)
      Sets the geographic location for this tracking event.
      Parameters:
      location - the location string to assign; must not be blank

    • getRemarks

      public String getRemarks()
      Returns the optional remarks or notes for this tracking event.
      Returns:
      the remarks string, or null if none were provided

    • setRemarks

      public void setRemarks(String remarks)
      Sets the optional remarks or notes for this tracking event.
      Parameters:
      remarks - the remarks text to assign

    • getCreatedAt

      public LocalDateTime getCreatedAt()
      Returns the timestamp at which this tracking update was created.
      Returns:
      the creation timestamp as a LocalDateTime

    • setCreatedAt

      public void setCreatedAt(LocalDateTime createdAt)
      Sets the timestamp at which this tracking update was created.
      Parameters:
      createdAt - the creation timestamp to assign
